---
title: Sensitivities and Mechanisms of the Zonal Mean Atmospheric Circulation Response
  to Tropical Warming
pagetitle: 2013-8-1-Sun2013 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2013
author: Lantao Sun, Gang Chen and Jian Lu
venue: Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences
venue_cit: <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 70, 2487--2504, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-12-0298.1.
recommended_citation: 'Lantao Sun, Gang Chen and Jian Lu, 2013: Sensitivities and
  Mechanisms of the Zonal Mean Atmospheric Circulation Response to Tropical Warming,
  <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 70, 2487--2504, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-12-0298.1.'
paper_url: http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS-D-12-0298.1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Sensitivities and Mechanisms of the Zonal Mean Atmospheric Circulation Response to Tropical Warming

*Published in Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences, 2013*

**Recommended citation:** Lantao Sun, Gang Chen and Jian Lu, 2013: Sensitivities and Mechanisms of the Zonal Mean Atmospheric Circulation Response to Tropical Warming, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 70, 2487--2504, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-12-0298.1.

[Download paper](http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS-D-12-0298.1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
